content.en:
If he hadn't created his own Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect in the past, it would have been really difficult for him to deal with this group of Yuanxia female beasts, but now it was very simple.

Rumble!!!!!

The thirty-fold dimensional rules were suppressed, coupled with the outbreak of the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sword Twelve.

In an instant, these Yuanxia female beasts were bombarded by the sword light one after another, and they couldn't resist at all.

After killing this group of Yuanxia mother beasts, Ye Tian took the Yuanxia mother liquid here.

Then, here he used the token given by the mysterious woman and teleported directly into the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

This batch of Yuanxia mother liquor is quite a lot, more than the amount obtained in the past, which can naturally help the mysterious woman resist the influence of the spell spirit gold vein.

Having obtained so much Yuanxia mother liquor at once, the mysterious woman was also in a good mood.

And Ye Tian continued to collect Yuanxia Mother Liquor, so that in the future, he could comprehend the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Ten for a long time, otherwise the mysterious woman would urge him to collect Yuanxia Mother Liquor again and again, which would undoubtedly delay his cultivation.

In the following days, Ye Tian looked for Yuanxia mother liquor in Zixu River.

this day.

He encountered a multi-dimensional life of the seventh realm, and after fighting with the other party, he got rid of the other party.

Soon after, he found a place of Yuanxia Mother Liquor again, but it was a multi-dimensional life of the Seventh Realm that guarded it.

So, while Ye Tian was fighting with this Seventh Realm multi-dimensional life, the other copy body snatched Yuanxia Mother Liquor, and easily got Yuan Xia's Mother Liquor.

In the days that followed, he obtained more and more Yuanxia mother liquor, which also allowed the mysterious woman to gradually recover from the erosion of her body caused by the influence of the spell spirit gold vein in the past.

However, her own injuries were not caused by the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, which could not be recovered using Yuanxia's mother liquid.

However, after she has enough Yuanxia Mother Liquid, she will not be afraid of the influence of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein in the future, and she can slowly repair her injuries little by little, and there will be a day when she will be repaired intact in the morning.

Another long time has passed.

Ye Tian had already gathered enough Yuanxia Mother Liquor, so he applied to participate in the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone again, and was not in a hurry to collect Yuanxia Mother Liquor.

One domain after another years have passed.

Thirty-one dimensional rules!

Thirty-two dimensional rules!

Thirty-Three Dimensional Rules!

Five hundred years later.

Ye Tian had already comprehended the rules of the thirty-five dimensions, but it was very difficult to comprehend the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, not that he was stuck in a bottleneck, but that the rules of the thirty-six dimensions were the limit that the sixth realm could comprehend.

Therefore, at this point, it is difficult to continue to improve, and it takes a long time to comprehend the rules of the thirty-six dimensions.

But.

With the help of the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, coupled with the multi-dimensional wisdom light and the Silver Xuan Illustrated Book, Ye Tian was still able to comprehend the efficiency.

In the blink of an eye, another five hundred domain yuan years have passed.

Finally, Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, and he also felt the real limit, even if there was a great opportunity in the future, it would be impossible for him to comprehend the rules of the thirty-seven dimensions in the sixth realm.

Therefore, he must go to the seventh realm.

"Senior, I have comprehended the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, and I am going to attack the seventh realm.~!" Ye Tian came to the mysterious woman and said.

"Okay, you go and break through, after you reach the seventh realm, come here again, I have something to talk to you about!" said the mysterious woman.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian responded and left immediately.

......

This side of the Territory of 500.

Terran, HQ.

Ye Tian is here to retreat and impact the seventh realm, although the energy here is thin, but he has prepared a lot of resources, which is enough for himself to break through to the seventh realm, and it is not a big problem.

"Here we go!"

Ye Tian began to use the dimensional rules in his body, and the dimensional void began to superimpose one dimensional void after another.

The second dimension of the void, the superposition is successful.

The third dimension of the void, the superposition is successful.

The fourth dimension of the void is successfully superimposed.

As time passed, one dimensional void after another stacked.

Then, he began to break through the bottleneck, drawing on the energy of the outside world to make a breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!

The body transforms, the soul will transforms, and the cultivation begins to break through.

The large amount of resources prepared by Ye Tian was swallowed by him one by one and used to assist his breakthrough.

After a long time.

Ye Tian finally completed the breakthrough and completely entered the seventh realm.

He sensed the thirty-six-fold dimensional void in his body, and at this moment, he had completed a perfect cycle, turning into a dimensional domain containing the thirty-six-fold dimensional void, which seemed to combine the thirty-six-dimensional void in a special way and become extremely stable.

And this dimensional domain is still refining the dimensional void, making the dimensional void more stable and powerful, and becoming indestructible.

"'No wonder that mysterious woman said that with a breakthrough in the thirty-six dimensional rules, the dimensional void in her body would be extremely stable, and it was indeed so. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Now that he has broken through to the seventh realm, his soul will has also reached the thirteenth level, and his physical fitness has become dozens of times stronger, and he is too much stronger in all aspects.

Instantly, he easily escaped into the thirteenth dimension, but soon returned.

He didn't know anything about the thirteenth dimension now, so he naturally didn't dare to explore the thirteenth dimension, in case he provoked the forces with the eighth realm, it would not be a good thing.

"You have to continue to improve the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He couldn't dodge the deduction of the eighth realm now, but if he cultivated the thirty-six Star Secret Technique to the twenty-eighth level, he would be able to cover up the deduction of the weaker eighth realm.

Over the years, he hadn't cultivated much of the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique, but now he had to pay attention to it.

Thereupon.

In the following days (Wang Nuohao), he began to practice the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique.

His other replica body went to the depths of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, and he wanted to talk to the mysterious woman, who seemed to have something to discuss with him, maybe it was chance.

......

Cursed gold veins deep down.

Ye Tian stood in front of the mysterious woman.

The mysterious woman said: "Very good, you are now in the seventh realm, and your combat power is at the top level in the seventh realm, and you have the strength to further cooperate with me." "

"What kind of cooperation do seniors want?"

Ye Tian asked.

The mysterious woman said: "You should be able to see that I am injured, and the injury is very serious, so I need some healing treasures to help me heal, and you now have the strength to obtain such resources, as long as the number is enough, you can still let my injuries recover some." In return, I'll give you some opportunities to help you improve your strength. "。
